markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify GrowthX's partnership scope for Unify's internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clarified Scope:** GrowthX will create SEO-driven content (blogs, guides) to capture search traffic, not product-focused marketing materials (case studies).](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Brand Voice Alignment:** Unify's examples were for brand voice guidance only, not content format, resolving a key potential misalignment.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Decision-Maker Briefing:** Tyler will provide a one-pager with a competitive SEO analysis (vs. ZoomInfo, Clay, Apollo) and a phased engagement plan for Charlie to present to Austin.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Urgency:** GrowthX's January client slots are booking, creating a timeline for Austin's evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Scope & Content Strategy

  - [**GrowthX's Focus:** Drive organic traffic via SEO/AEO-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**In-Scope:** Editorial content (blogs, guides) targeting keywords where Unify can rank.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**Out-of-Scope:** Product-focused marketing (case studies). Unify's internal team will continue this.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Unify's Examples:** Provided solely to guide brand voice and tone, not content format.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Relevant GrowthX Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - ["Outreach" and "Exec" content](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Ramp's programmatic assets (vendor catalog, per diem calculator)](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Competitive Analysis & Engagement Plan

  - [Tyler created a one-pager to help Charlie brief Austin and Ethan.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Analysis:** Identifies SEO opportunities against competitors: ZoomInfo, Clay, Apollo, Common Room.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Proposed Content Pillar:** "Warm Outbound" (vs. cold outbound), positioning Unify as the leader in AI-native GTM.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Engagement Plan:** Outlines a phased approach with associated costs.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send the one-pager, call recording, and relevant GrowthX content examples to Charlie.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Charlie:**](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [Present the one-pager and partnership proposal to Austin and Ethan.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [Assess Austin's interest in evaluating GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Regroup with Tyler by EOW to schedule a follow-up call, potentially including Austin.](https://fathom.video/share/xcqR4bjjpvs1H6kfrynpkFCUSCyWsi-H?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
